summary: An 18-second, music-scored ICE perp-walk clip (no spoken transcript) that opens with a stylized particle-disintegration VFX transition (a 'Thanos-snap'-style dissolve meme effect) before cutting to handcuffed detainees being escorted through a garage by masked tactical officers in 'POLICE / FUGITIVE OPERATIONS / SPECIAL WEAPONS TEAM' gear beside an armored BearCat. The deliberate VFX intro, music bed and dramatic framing of masked operators and a military vehicle turn a routine perp-walk into a social-media-native hype spectacle, putting it in scope as youth-appeal produced content.

script.scene: Stylized particle-disintegration VFX transition: a figure rendered as scattering dust/particles against black, a cinematic 'dissolve' meme effect.
Handcuffed male detainee (gray shirt, hands cuffed behind back) walked across a garage floor flanked by two masked tactical officers; armored vehicle behind.
Rear view of an officer whose plate carrier reads 'POLICE' and 'FUGITIVE OPERATIONS' escorting the cuffed detainee toward a black SUV.
Detainee held between two masked agents in 'POLICE' vests in front of an armored 'SPECIAL WEAPONS TEAM' BearCat, fire extinguisher and yellow floor lines visible.
Continued perp-walk beat: cuffed detainee centered between masked operators with the armored vehicle filling the background.
